releases.summary: Patches high-severity Denial of Service via Server Components (GHSA-q4gf-8mx6-v5v3, CVSS 7.5). All repos running Next.js 16.x below 16.2.3 are vulnerable. Also includes HTTP request smuggling fix (GHSA-ggv3-7p47-pfv8) and null-origin CSRF bypass patch.
releases.action: UPGRADE NOW — run `npm install next@^16.2.4` in Career-Portfolio (^16.1.6), career-launchpad (16.1.6), cca-study (16.2.1), orbit-dashboard (16.2.1), texas-elections (^16.2.2). the-squeeze at ^15.5.0 needs `npm install next@^15.5.15` for the 15.x fix.

releases.summary: 19.2.5 is the current stable. React 19.2 introduced the Activity API (deferred/background rendering), the `useEffectEvent` hook (stable), and improvements to Server Components and hydration. No breaking changes from 19.1.
releases.action: Update when convenient. No urgent security issues.

releases.summary: 4.2.4 (Apr 21) fixes Vite alias resolution in @import and @plugin. 4.2.3 (Apr 20) adds canonicalization improvements for tracking-* utilities. New utilities added in 4.2.x: padding-block (pbs-*/pbe-*), margin-block (mbs-*/mbe-*), border-block, inline/block size utilities. Astro v5 support added.
releases.action: Patch update — safe to apply with `npm update tailwindcss`.

releases.summary: Minor release with new icons. Published 3 days ago.

TypeScript 5.8 adds the `--erasableSyntaxOnly` flag (for Node.js type-stripping compatibility) and granular checking of return expressions in conditional branches. No breaking changes for existing code. 5.9 planned for July 2026 with `import defer` support.
releases.action: No urgent action. Plan upgrade to 5.8 at next sprint.

releases.summary: Node.js 26 released April 2026 as the new Current branch. Node.js 24 remains the active LTS (until Oct 2027). Node.js 22 is moving from Active LTS to Maintenance LTS — still supported until April 2027 but no new features. Repos using Node 22+ are still fine.
releases.action: No immediate action needed on Node 22. Track for Node 24 LTS migration over next 6 months.

releases.summary: AI Gateway additions: GPT-5.5, DeepSeek V4 (1M token context), Claude Opus 4.7. Vercel Flags launched (feature flag provider built into Vercel Dashboard). Security incident bulletin published April 2026 — review at https://vercel.com/changelog if running sensitive workloads.
releases.action: Review Vercel security incident bulletin. No code changes needed unless affected.

releases.summary: Minor update, published ~1 month ago. No breaking changes noted.
Active release cadence — published 10 days ago. Patch release.

summary.top_action: Upgrade Next.js to 16.2.4 across all 16.x repos (Career-Portfolio, career-launchpad, cca-study, orbit-dashboard, texas-elections) and to 15.5.15+ in the-squeeze. Patches CVSS 7.5 DoS via Server Components.
